rulings.Case Title: BRUCE LEE CEARLOCK et al VS. ALYCE D. CRAFT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Alyce D. Craft'S Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Jennifer J. Capabianco; Declaration Of William Webb Farrer;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 10, 2015, line 12. DEFENDANT Alyce D. Craft's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED as requested. Defendant is entitled to recover attorney's fees per contract and costs. Requested fees are reasonable and necessary. No opposition filed. Previously granted sanctions to be included in the final judgment. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT C DAVIS VS. URBAN LAND PRESERVATION, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 10, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT URBAN LAND PRESERVATION, LLC and JOHN ROWELL's Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed GRANTED, Purchase Agreement, the only agreement to which both remaining parties are signatories, contains an enforceable binding arbitration provision. Indemnification Agreement is not signed by the moving party and by its own terms is not intended to contravene any other agreements (including Purchase Agreement) by which parties are bound. The action is stayed pending arbitration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWIN NEIL ACOSTA ET AL VS. SHERMAN LEUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Joinder Of Necessary And Indispensable Party
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 10, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANTs CASSELLI-LEUNG BENSHING, LLC and SHERMAN LEUNG's Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Joinder Of Necessary And Indispensable Party GRANTED. Victor Perdoza, master-tenant, shall be a named party in this action. Plaintiffs do not deny that they have never paid rent directly to the landlord. Additionally, Plaintiffs are seeking restitution. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 10, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF XELAN PROP 1 LLC' Motion To Re-Open Discovery Before New Trial Date Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD L LAZZARETTO AND CONNIE LAZZARETTO TRUSTEES VS. KATHY RENEE HIRZEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Continue Masking Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 10, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT KATHY HIRZEL's Motion To Continue Masking Records GRANTED in part. The records shall remain masked through June 19, 2015. Plaintiff is ordered to provide redacted copies of the rental application (driver's license number, SSN, bank account and credit card numbers) to record's department to replace unredacted copies no later than June 18, 2015. Plaintiff shall consult with the Record's Department regarding proper procedure. = (501/REQ)

PLAINTIFF SHANG SHANG's Amended Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Enter Judgment For Possession Pursuant To Stipulation DENIED. No dismissal was entered in this case. Defendant's answer has been stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICE FAMILY SAN FRANCISCO VS. JOEL GOLEBURN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 10, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANT JOEL GOLEBURN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. Plaintiff does not claim that service described in Defendant's declaration (May 7 or 8, 2015) was a proper service. Defendant's Motion does not address service on May 11, 2015 (substitute service) and May 12, 2015 (mailing). = (501/REQ)
